2026-06-02TCCanada Marine ActAppointment of a director of the Thunder Bay Port AuthorityAppointment of Jamie Taylor of Thunder Bay, Ontario, to be a director of the Thunder Bay Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years, effective June 7, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the Thunder Bay Port Authority
precis: Appointment of Jamie Taylor of Thunder Bay, Ontario, to be a director of the Thunder Bay Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years, effective June 7, 2026.
